humanEffortEstimate.rationale: Comprehensive content strategy synthesis across messaging, microcopy definitions covering specific edge case constraints, tone of voice boundaries, and macro SEO alignment based on the provided BA/PM inputs.

frameworkObservations.observation: Content Strategist agent cannot automatically verify completion of Work Item states without direct CI access or terminal permissions.
frameworkObservations.suggestion: Allow agents a read-only terminal or direct Azure Boards API integration context to self-validate if terminal tools are withheld.
